questions.text: Traffic - Is the dwelling in a high traffic area (near a main road, school, hospital etc), and require traffic management?
Power / Services - Is the power, gas, water and sewer visible as per the site plan, and in good condition?
Power / Services - Do you have any overhead power lines?
Power / Services - Do you require tiger tails?

Power / Services - Does this site have a pit dome or requires a distribution dome? If so, please advise Cousins Electrics. If you are unable to locate dome or if there is restricted access, please inform Cousins Electrics.
Boundary Fence - Is the boundary fencing onsite removed as required for us to commence onsite?
Boundary Fence - Is the fencing in good condition?
Kerb / Footpath - Is there any current damage to the kerb / footpath?
Retaining Wall - Are the retaining walls completed onsite prior to us commencing, and are they in good condition?
Boundary Conditions - Are there any retaining walls, fences or other site conditions that will be undermined or damaged by excavation works?
Height Of Retaining Walls - Is there a likelihood someone could fall, and cause injury, from the edge of a retaining wall?
Height Of Retaining Walls - For falls greater than 2m, has fall prevention measures (edge protection/guardrails) been installed?
Height Of Retaining Walls - For falls less than 2m, has reasonably practicable controls been applied?
Rubbish - Is the site free of excessive rubbish? If not, contact Client Liaison to request client to remove rubbish.
Sewer - Check location (Contact Outlook Plumbing if required to be moved)
